Name: Pattern Recognition - PE

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: noting that theres a context switch from the Quarterly Report back to Document1 that should be tracked as part of the same case

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: defining the activity types and attributes Ill use things like Open Document Edit Document Content Save Document along with metadata like application resource and transition state

Name: Validation - IND
Text: building out the event sequence ordered by timestamp starting with the focus on Quarterly Report docx at 085950 then the switch to Document1 docx at 090000

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: treating the context switch as a derived event marking it as such so I can capture when work was suspended and later resumed at 090715

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: For the switches between applications Im deciding to record each one as two rows one marking the suspension of work on the source case and another marking the opening or resuming of work on the target case

Name: Validation - PE
Text: This keeps the event log consistent and clear about whats happening at each transition point like the switch from Document1 to Email at 090145 then Email to PDF at 090400 and later Excel back to Document1 at 090600

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: mapping out the Email case events in sequence opening the client at the switch point clicking to view a specific message about the annual meeting scrolling through the content clicking reply typing out the response sending it and then closing the email handling when switching away at 090400

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The email case ends there since it was sent so Im marking 090400 as the transition point where the PDF case begins

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The PDF work includes opening the document reviewing its content highlighting annotations and then suspending at 090500 without resuming leaving it as an incomplete case

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: the spreadsheet work starts at 090500 with data updates and a save before suspending around 090600

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Document1 resumes at 090600 with editing and saving through 090700 while the Quarterly Report case has an earlier start at 085950 suspends then resumes at 090715 for final edits and closure

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
